_description: Drop4 UI asset manifest. Each entry generates one PNG via Nano Banana (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image). Run: node tools/gen-art.mjs [--only=<group>] [--force] [--dry-run]
_style_lockup: Every prompt should include the shared style lockup so the full UI pack reads as one game. If you tweak this, regenerate with --force so nothing drifts.
_style_lockup_text: Premium mobile game UI asset for 'Drop4', a stylized Connect-4 game. Dark navy background, neon orange and warm gold accents, subtle purple highlights, glossy plastic + metal material mix. Flat but dimensional, no text, clean edges, slight inner glow, drop shadow. Mobile game polish like Basketball Stars or Candy Crush Saga. No clutter, no borders, centered subject. Render as a transparent PNG.

Drop4 premium mobile game wordmark logo per VISUAL_DIRECTION_LOCKIN. Transparent background isolated. The wordmark reads 'DROP4' but the 'DROP' letters and the '4' character use TWO DIFFERENT, CONTRASTING palettes — this is the signature visual feature. They MUST look like two halves of a brand: cool half + warm half.

'DROP' (4 letters: D, R, O, P) — CHUNKY BOLD 3D BLOCK letters with a STRICTLY COOL palette face: pure white at the top of each letter, transitioning to true cyan-blue in the middle, ending at deep cobalt navy at the bottom. Thin white rim highlight along the upper edge. ABSOLUTELY NO pink, NO magenta, NO purple, NO orange, NO red, NO warm tones anywhere on the DROP letter faces. Each DROP letter has a strong downward 3D extrusion underneath in a warm orange-to-deep-red gradient (the warm depth contrasts with the cool face above).

'4' (a single character at the right side of the wordmark) — STRICTLY WARM palette face: rich gold at the top, bright orange in the middle, deep crimson red at the bottom. Golden-yellow rim highlight along the upper edge. ABSOLUTELY NO blue, NO cyan, NO white face on the 4 — this character is the warm half of the wordmark and must be visually distinct from the cool 'DROP' letters next to it. The 4 also has a downward 3D extrusion in a warm deep-red gradient.

The ENTIRE wordmark silhouette (DROP + 4 together) is wrapped in a thick dark navy outline (~4-5px). A handful of small white-and-yellow sparkle stars scattered subtly around the lower edge only.

Mood: chunky playful 3D dimensional, Brawl Stars / Coin Master / Subway Surfers logo language. The cool DROP + warm 4 contrast is the brand's signature.

NO Connect 4 disc replacing any letter. NO halo behind the wordmark. NO drop-shadow stack behind the silhouette. NO sleek chrome. NO thin sans-serif typography. NO childish balloon font. NO uniform color across both DROP and 4 — they MUST be different palettes.
